# Claude Code — Engineering Log

**MANDATORY: Before responding to ANY request, Read `.ai/harness/AGENTS.md` in full. Do not skip. The instructions there govern all work in this repo.**

## Startup Read-Head (execute before first tool call)

1. `.ai/runtime/second-brain/recall-bundle.md` — if present, read FIRST
2. `.ai/harness/ddd-project.md` — project identity, structure, top gotchas
3. `.ai/harness/ddd-ubiquitous-language.md` — domain vocabulary (VPP, FBE, Trade Platform...)
4. `.ai/memory/lessons-learned.json` — filter by `scope` matching your task files
5. Emit `[ANCHOR-LOADED: ddd-project=read, ubiquitous-language=read, lessons-checked=yes]` before first content tool call

Detailed mandate: `.ai/harness/rules/governance/anchor-context-startup.md`

## Claude-Specific

**Rules**: `.claude/rules/` — governance (always-on), structure, markdown, domain.
**Skills**: `.claude/skills/on-call-log-entry/SKILL.md` — on-call incident log skill.
**Hooks**: `.claude/settings.json` — SessionStart loads anchor context; PostToolUse enforces task workspace boundaries; Stop runs health check.

## Key Constraint

This is a **markdown-only content repo**. No code to compile or format.
`post-edit.sh` remains intentionally a no-op; task workspace enforcement is handled by the `PostToolUse` guard.

## Task Workspace

Task IDs MUST be allocated with `.ai/harness/scripts/claim-task-id.sh <slug>`.
All task artifacts → `.ai/tasks/{task_id}_{slug}/`.
Per-session state → `.ai/runtime/current-task/{session_id}.json`.
Log output → `log/employer/eneco/02_on_call_shift/{YYYY_MM_DD}_{slug}/`
